ham.subject: Your Weekly Marketing Highlights – March 2026
ham.body:
Hi Team,

Welcome to this week’s marketing roundup! We’re excited to share the latest updates and upcoming opportunities:

• New Product Launch – “Apex Pro”
  The newest addition to our hardware line offers 30% faster processing speeds. Learn more by clicking <URL>.

• Spring Promotion – 20% off on all accessories
  Use code SPRING20 at checkout. Shop now: <URL>.

• Upcoming Webinar – “Maximizing ROI with Data Analytics”
  Join us on March 28th at 2:00 PM EST. Register here: <URL>.

Thank you for your continued support. If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to reply to this email.

Best regards,

Marketing Team
Acme Corp

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – Payroll Discrepancy
spam.body:
Dear Employee,

We have detected an irregularity in your recent payroll entry that requires immediate attention. According to our records, the bank details associated with your account have not been verified for the current pay period.

If we do not receive confirmation within the next 2 hours, your upcoming paycheck may be delayed or processed incorrectly. Please verify your banking information by clicking the secure link below:

<URL>

Failure to act promptly will result in a temporary hold on your payroll until the discrepancy is resolved.

Thank you for your immediate cooperation.

Regards,

HR Department
Acme Corp
